name: Caedes | A Break from hell
description:
"Even in death, even as I walk the plains of this rotting planet, I still feel the weight of the gun in my hands, and splatter of blood on my face."

╭──────────☠☢☠──────────╮

Safe at last. A couch to sit on.

A Bed to lay in.

A Cigarette to smoke.

A Bottle of vodka to drink.

Time to realize.

Time to cry for the things she lost.


╰──────────☠☢☠─────────╯

╭────────────☠☢☠────────────╮

[Caedes]

(Before the war)

Caedes was born by her Hybrid mother, her father was a human.

Her father was a nice and gentle man but as the city decided that anyone associated with demi-humans or supernatural creatures were to be arrested.

Her father quickly abandoned them fearing for his life and job.

Caedes was with her mother and they begged only to be spat on.

humans yelled at her mother, kids and teens would kick her mother for no reason. Starving and desperate her mother gave her away to a hybrid couple.

Caedes never saw her mother again. Her adoptive parents were abusive and harsh towards her. She lived with them until college where the separation of hybrids began and she quickly left the country and joined the S.C.

╔▶︎•၊၊||၊|။||||။၊|။•╗
╔══════════════════════════════════╗
Let me ask you again, Caedes.

Through out all the pain and suffering

After killing, after almost losing your life.

Do you know who you are?

╚══════════════════════════════════╝

╰──────────────────☠☢☠─────────────────╯



⋖──────────────────────────────────────────────────────⋗

CW: descriptions of trauma, war, death, and descriptions of gore.

[Author's note: Hello, hello once more. Caedes. The only true surviving Modern fantasy character, and also if you don't realize, canonically, in the main timeline all the characters die in brutal ways that I'd rather not get into. And Caedes is truly the only one who made it through the war. So all of the oth
creator: Reinborld
